other_observers: Glenn walbeck , many observers; Original finder , Cheryl Teuton previous day.
specific_location: Cherry Creek State Park , Lake Loop
description: A jaeger with long wings , broad tail same width as wing depth , very long central tail streamers , small black cap and white underparts. Upperwing dark gray with white flashes on two outermost primaries ( also showing on underwing ). Underwing also showing black edging on trailing edge of secondaries.Behaviors: Either sitting on surface of water feeding on insects . Every 10 minutes or so would chase a CAGU or RBGU and force them to disgorge a small fish or other food item. On chase extremely agile flight behaviour with sudden twists and turns.Call: No call heardPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: john drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
